name: Loyalty Pawn #1
description_short: Sacramento-area pawn chain with 4 locations offering no-credit-check collateral loans, same-day cash, and discounted luxury watches, jewelry, and handbags.
description_long:
Loyalty Pawn is a multi-location pawn shop chain based in the Greater Sacramento, California area. Operating four storefronts — El Camino, Florin Mall, Roseville, and Broadway — the company markets itself as a community-rooted, family-oriented business embedded in its local neighborhoods. With individual store phone numbers and a centralized toll-free line at (844) 925-4722, Loyalty Pawn functions as a regional chain rather than a single-location operator, providing coverage across multiple Sacramento-area corridors.

The flagship service is no-credit-check collateral loans, where customers pledge a valuable item to secure same-day cash. Loan amounts range from a few hundred dollars to tens of thousands, scaled to the assessed value of the collateral. On the buy and sell side, the shop deals in designer watches, designer handbags, gold and silver, fine jewelry, electronics (TVs, laptops, cameras, video equipment), power tools and construction equipment, musical instruments, stereo equipment, and video games and consoles. Customers can also browse and purchase items through the shop's eBay storefront, extending access beyond in-person visits.

The most distinctive element of Loyalty Pawn's offering is its focus on luxury goods. Designer watches and high-end handbags feature prominently in the company's branding, suggesting a specialist depth beyond a typical general-merchandise pawn shop. For buyers, a 10-10-10 layaway program requires 10% down with the balance paid in 10 equal monthly installments of 10% each, making higher-priced items more accessible without full upfront payment. All prices are described as negotiable, and the multi-location footprint provides reasonable geographic coverage across the Sacramento metro.

Loyalty Pawn fills a real need for Greater Sacramento consumers who need immediate cash without a credit check or who want affordable access to luxury and everyday merchandise. The same-day loan process is straightforward and the no-credit requirement removes the primary barrier for underbanked borrowers. That said, the website discloses no information on loan interest rates, fees, or repayment terms — a significant omission for any borrower evaluating true cost. As with all pawn loans, unpaid collateral can be forfeited and resold. Prospective borrowers should ask in-store for the full cost of the loan before pledging any item.
pros: No credit check required — anyone with a valuable item can access a loan
Loan amounts scale up to tens of thousands depending on collateral value
Specializes in luxury items (designer watches, handbags) — higher-value collateral accepted
10-10-10 layaway program spreads purchase cost over 10 months
Four Sacramento-area locations with consistent 10AM–6PM hours including Sundays
eBay store available for online buyers
cons: Loan interest rates, fees, and repayment terms are not disclosed on the website
Services are limited to the Greater Sacramento area — no national or online lending
Collateral items can be sold if the loan is not repaid within the agreed term
No information on minimum or maximum loan durations provided online
best_for: Greater Sacramento residents who need same-day cash without a credit check
Sellers with pre-owned valuables — jewelry, gold, designer goods, or electronics
Buyers looking for discounted luxury watches, handbags, or jewelry at negotiable prices
Shoppers who want a layaway option on higher-priced resale merchandise
diagnosis: Best for Greater Sacramento residents who need fast, no-credit-check cash or want access to discounted luxury and everyday merchandise across four convenient locations. Main caveat: loan rates and fees are not disclosed online — borrowers must ask in-store about the full APR and redemption terms before pledging collateral, as unpaid items can be forfeited and resold.
services: Gold and silver buying and selling
Electronics buying and selling (TVs, laptops, cameras)
Tools and construction equipment buying and selling
Musical instruments and stereo equipment buying and selling
Video games and consoles buying and selling
eBay online store for remote buyers
